pi_items.source: Web search confirmed crawler-test.com is a real public website designed for testing web crawlers and SEO tools
Path is specified in setup_task.sh (line 44-46), export_result.sh (line 10-15), and verifier.py function. Consistent across all task scripts.
Path is specified in setup_task.sh (line 45, 52), export_result.sh (line 11, 54), and task description. Consistent across all task scripts.

Screaming Frog official documentation (https://www.screamingfrog.co.uk/how-to-perform-a-cookie-audit/) lists all cookie export columns. The 'All Cookies' bulk export includes all cookie attributes: name, value, domain, expiration/expiry time, secure attribute, and HttpOnly attribute.
Verified against export_result.sh (line 72: checks CSV_ROW_COUNT > 0) and verifier.py (line 72: checks row_count > 0). Both confirm minimum 1 cookie row expected.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves auditing cookies collected by Screaming Frog SEO Spider from https://crawler-test.com/, a real public website designed for testing web crawlers. The export should be saved to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/cookie_inventory.csv and a summary report to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/cookie_summary.txt. The minimum expected number of cookies is 1. However, the metadata claim about CSV headers is incomplete: while it lists 4 headers (Address, Cookie Name, Cookie Value, Domain), Screaming Frog's actual 'All Cookies' export includes 7 columns total, also including Expiration Time, Secure, and HttpOnly attributes.
